hypothesis: The Bollinger Band touch-and-bounce reversal strategy is effective in XAUUSD on M15, with a 3-bar pattern confirming the reversal.

long.condition: bar[-2] close > lower_bb && bar[-1] touched/broke lower_bb && bar[0] closed back above lower_bb

short.condition: bar[-2] close < upper_bb && bar[-1] touched/broke upper_bb && bar[0] closed back below upper_bb
